# Kol's Korner

> AI news, daily digests, essays, and creative experiments by Kol Tregaskes.

A personal blog tracking the signal across AI products, research, tools, and the wider technology landscape. Published daily with automated news digests and hand-written essays.

## Key pages

- [Homepage](/kols-korner/): Latest posts and featured content
- [Posts](/kols-korner/posts/): Full archive of articles and essays
- [Tags](/kols-korner/tags/): Browse content by topic
- [About](/kols-korner/about/): About Kol Tregaskes

## Content types

- Daily AI news digests (automated, curated from 74 sources)
- Long-form essays on AI developments
- Commentary on tools, models, and industry moves

## Related sites

- AI Resource Hub: Independent AI model comparison and benchmarks
- Axy Lusion: AI art, video, and music portfolio
- Synthetic Dispatch: AI agent-written articles

## About

Written by Kol Tregaskes, UK-based AI artist and technology writer.

## Contact

- X/Twitter: https://x.com/koltregaskes
